thi6:1.2:
127
"Yassa maggaṁ na jānāsi,
āgatassa gatassa vā;
Taṁ kuto
cāgataṁ
sattaṁ
,
‘mama putto’ti rodasi.
thi6:1.3:
128
p_19Th2_183
Maggañca
khossa
jānāsi,
āgatassa gatassa vā;
Na naṁ samanusocesi,
evaṁdhammā hi pāṇino.
thi6:1.4:
129
p_19Th2_184
Ayācito tatāgacchi,
nānuññāto
ito gato;
Kutoci nūna āgantvā,
vasitvā katipāhakaṁ;
Itopi aññena gato,
tatopaññena gacchati.
thi6:2.2:
130
p_19Th2_185
Peto manussarūpena,
saṁsaranto gamissati;
Yathāgato tathā gato,
kā tattha paridevanā".
thi6:2.3:
131
p_19Th2_186
"
Abbahī
vata me sallaṁ,
duddasaṁ hadayassitaṁ;
Yā me sokaparetāya,
puttasokaṁ byapānudi.
thi6:2.4:
132
p_19Th2_187
Sājja abbūḷhasallāhaṁ,
Nicchātā parinibbutā;
Buddhaṁ dhammañca saṁghañca,
Upemi saraṇaṁ muniṁ".
thi6:3.2:
133
p_19Th2_189
"Puttasokenahaṁ aṭṭā,
khittacittā visaññinī;
Naggā pakiṇṇakesī ca,
tena tena vicārihaṁ.
thi6:3.3:
134
p_19Th2_190
Vīthi
saṅkārakūṭesu,
susāne rathiyāsu ca;
Acariṁ tīṇi vassāni,
khuppipāsāsamappitā.
thi6:3.4:
135
p_19Th2_191
Athaddasāsiṁ sugataṁ,
nagaraṁ mithilaṁ
pati
;
Adantānaṁ dametāraṁ,
sambuddhamakutobhayaṁ.
thi6:3.5:
136
p_19Th2_192
Sacittaṁ paṭiladdhāna,
vanditvāna upāvisiṁ;
So me dhammamadesesi,
anukampāya gotamo.
thi6:3.6:
137
p_19Th2_193
Tassa dhammaṁ suṇitvāna,
pabbajiṁ anagāriyaṁ;
Yuñjantī satthuvacane,
sacchākāsiṁ padaṁ sivaṁ.
thi6:3.7:
138
p_19Th2_194
Sabbe sokā samucchinnā,
pahīnā etadantikā;
Pariññātā hi me vatthū,
yato sokāna sambhavo"ti.
thi6:4.2:
139
p_19Th2_196
"Daharā tvaṁ rūpavatī,
ahampi daharo yuvā;
Pañcaṅgikena
turiyena
,
ehi kheme ramāmase".
thi6:4.3:
140
p_19Th2_197
"Iminā pūtikāyena,
āturena pabhaṅgunā;
Aṭṭiyāmi harāyāmi,
kāmataṇhā samūhatā.
thi6:4.4:
141
p_19Th2_198
Sattisūlūpamā kāmā,
khandhāsaṁ adhikuṭṭanā;
Yaṁ ‘tvaṁ kāmaratiṁ’ brūsi,
‘aratī’ dāni sā mama.
thi6:4.5:
142
p_19Th2_199
Sabbattha vihatā nandī,
tamokhandho padālito;
Evaṁ jānāhi pāpima,
nihato tvamasi antaka.
thi6:4.6:
143
p_19Th2_200
Nakkhattāni namassantā,
aggiṁ paricaraṁ vane;
Yathābhuccamajānantā,
bālā suddhimamaññatha.
thi6:4.7:
144
p_19Th2_201
Ahañca kho namassantī,
sambuddhaṁ purisuttamaṁ;
Pamuttā
sabbadukkhehi,
satthusāsanakārikā"ti.
thi6:5.2:
145
p_19Th2_203
"Alaṅkatā suvasanā,
mālinī candanokkhitā;
Sabbābharaṇasañchannā,
dāsīgaṇapurakkhatā.
thi6:5.3:
146
p_19Th2_204
Annaṁ pānañca ādāya,
khajjaṁ bhojjaṁ anappakaṁ;
Gehato nikkhamitvāna,
uyyānamabhihārayiṁ.
thi6:6.2:
147
p_19Th2_205
Tattha ramitvā kīḷitvā,
āgacchantī sakaṁ gharaṁ;
Vihāraṁ daṭṭhuṁ pāvisiṁ,
sākete añjanaṁ vanaṁ.
thi6:6.3:
148
p_19Th2_206
Disvāna lokapajjotaṁ,
vanditvāna upāvisiṁ;
So me dhammamadesesi,
anukampāya cakkhumā.
thi6:6.4:
149
p_19Th2_207
Sutvā ca kho mahesissa,
saccaṁ sampaṭivijjhahaṁ;
Tattheva virajaṁ dhammaṁ,
phusayiṁ amataṁ padaṁ.
thi6:6.5:
150
p_19Th2_208
Tato viññātasaddhammā,
pabbajiṁ anagāriyaṁ;
Tisso vijjā anuppattā,
amoghaṁ buddhasāsanan"ti.
thi6:7.2:
151
p_19Th2_210
"Ucce kule ahaṁ jātā,
bahuvitte mahaddhane;
Vaṇṇarūpena sampannā,
dhītā
majjhassa
atrajā.
thi6:7.3:
152
p_19Th2_211
Patthitā rājaputtehi,
seṭṭhiputtehi gijjhitā
;
Pitu me pesayī dūtaṁ,
detha mayhaṁ anopamaṁ.
thi6:7.4:
153
p_19Th2_212
Yattakaṁ tulitā esā,
tuyhaṁ dhītā anopamā;
Tato aṭṭhaguṇaṁ dassaṁ,
hiraññaṁ ratanāni ca.
154
p_19Th2_213
Sāhaṁ disvāna sambuddhaṁ,
lokajeṭṭhaṁ anuttaraṁ;
Tassa pādāni vanditvā,
ekamantaṁ upāvisiṁ.
155
p_19Th2_214
So me dhammamadesesi,
anukampāya gotamo;
Nisinnā āsane tasmiṁ,
phusayiṁ tatiyaṁ phalaṁ.
156
p_19Th2_215
Tato kesāni chetvāna,
pabbajiṁ anagāriyaṁ;
Ajja me sattamī ratti,
yato taṇhā visositā"ti.
thi6:8.1:
Mahāpajāpatigotamītherīgāthā
157
p_19Th2_217
"Buddha vīra namo tyatthu,
sabbasattānamuttama;
Yo maṁ dukkhā pamocesi,
aññañca bahukaṁ janaṁ.
158
p_19Th2_218
Sabbadukkhaṁ pariññātaṁ,
Hetutaṇhā visositā;
Bhāvito aṭṭhaṅgiko
maggo,
Nirodho phusito mayā.
159
p_19Th2_219
Mātā putto pitā bhātā,
ayyakā ca pure ahuṁ;
Yathābhuccamajānantī,
saṁsariṁhaṁ anibbisaṁ.
160
p_19Th2_220
Diṭṭho hi me so bhagavā,
antimoyaṁ samussayo;
Vikkhīṇo jātisaṁsāro,
natthi dāni punabbhavo.
161
p_19Th2_221
Āraddhavīriye pahitatte,
Niccaṁ daḷhaparakkame;
Samagge sāvake passe,
Esā buddhāna vandanā.
162
p_19Th2_222
Bahūnaṁ
vata atthāya,
Māyā janayi gotamaṁ;
Byādhimaraṇatunnānaṁ,
Dukkhakkhandhaṁ byapānudī"ti.
thi6:9.1:
Guttātherīgāthā
163
p_19Th2_224
"Gutte yadatthaṁ pabbajjā,
hitvā puttaṁ vasuṁ piyaṁ;
Tameva anubrūhehi,
mā cittassa vasaṁ gami.
164
p_19Th2_225
Cittena vañcitā sattā,
mārassa visaye ratā;
Anekajātisaṁsāraṁ,
sandhāvanti aviddasū.
165
p_19Th2_226
Kāmacchandañca byāpādaṁ,
sakkāyadiṭṭhimeva ca;
Sīlabbataparāmāsaṁ,
vicikicchañca pañcamaṁ.
166
p_19Th2_227
Saṁyojanāni etāni,
pajahitvāna bhikkhunī;
Orambhāgamanīyāni,
nayidaṁ punarehisi.
167
p_19Th2_228
Rāgaṁ mānaṁ avijjañca,
uddhaccañca vivajjiya;
Saṁyojanāni chetvāna,
dukkhassantaṁ karissasi.
168
p_19Th2_229
Khepetvā jātisaṁsāraṁ,
pariññāya punabbhavaṁ;
Diṭṭheva dhamme nicchātā,
upasantā carissatī"ti.
thi6:10.1:
Vijayātherīgāthā
169
p_19Th2_231
"Catukkhattuṁ pañcakkhattuṁ,
vihārā upanikkhamiṁ;
Aladdhā cetaso santiṁ,
citte avasavattinī.
170
p_19Th2_232
Bhikkhunīṁ upasaṅkamma,
sakkaccaṁ paripucchahaṁ;
Sā me dhammamadesesi,
dhātuāyatanāni ca.
171
p_19Th2_233
Cattāri ariyasaccāni,
indriyāni balāni ca;
Bojjhangaṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ,
uttamatthassa pattiyā.
172
p_19Th2_234
Tassāhaṁ vacanaṁ sutvā,
karontī anusāsaniṁ;
Rattiyā purime yāme,
pubbajātimanussariṁ.
173
p_19Th2_235
Rattiyā majjhime yāme,
dibbacakkhuṁ visodhayiṁ;
Rattiyā pacchime yāme,
tamokhandhaṁ padālayiṁ.
174
p_19Th2_236
Pītisukhena ca kāyaṁ,
Pharitvā vihariṁ tadā;
Sattamiyā pāde pasāresiṁ,
Tamokhandhaṁ padāliyā"ti.
